notes.en: Seed-borne and persists between seasons via infected seed and crop residue. Common and sometimes severe in major Sri Lankan rice districts.

description.en: Lesions show a chevron pattern of light (tan) and darker reddish-brown zones on mature leaves; affected foliage turns straw-coloured and dry. At grain-fill, infected florets discolour and may lead to kernel sterility or abortion.

description.quote: a chevron pattern of light (tan) and darker reddish-brown areas on mature leaves. Affected foliage becomes straw-colored and dry.

favored_conditions.quote: seed borne and survives between seasons/crops via infected seeds
